failure.symptom: yarn install hangs indefinitely (no output after 5+ minutes, even with proxy and network-timeout). React Native project with heavy git-based dependencies (NativeBase from GitHub). npm install also fails with workspace:* protocol error.
attempted: yarn install with HTTP_PROXY and git proxy → hangs with no output, killed after 5 min
failure.recommendation: 跳过。React Native 项目，yarn install 因 git 依赖挂起无法完成。非 web 可部署项目。
